overall.description: A third-person perspective video game scene showing a hooded character walking through a dark forest at dusk. The character navigates through dense trees and rocky terrain covered with fallen autumn leaves, transitioning from a wooded area to a narrow rocky passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest with wooden fence line

events.description: hooded character comes into view and begins walking forward through the trees

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily through dark forest, navigating between tall pine trees and fence posts

entered.detail: dark silhouetted pine trees forming dense forest canopy
weathered wooden posts running along the left side of the path
narrow dirt trail covered with fallen leaves winding through trees
white-barked trees visible on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dark forest at dusk with dense pine trees and a wooden fence line visible. A hooded character enters the frame and begins walking along a leaf-covered dirt path, navigating through the closely spaced trees.

events.description: large rock formations become visible on the right side of the forest path

agents.ego_description: character continues walking along the forest path, moving toward increasingly rocky terrain

entered.detail: large gray rock formation emerging from the forest floor
tall rocky outcrop visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a moderately open forest section where the wooden fence disappears and rocky outcrops emerge on the right. The path remains covered in fallen leaves as the terrain gradually becomes rockier.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky mountain passage between boulders

events.description: path enters narrow rocky corridor with large boulders flanking both sides
character begins ascending the rocky incline between stone walls

agents.ego_description: character climbing up the rocky trail, navigating between large stone formations on either side

entered.detail: massive gray boulders forming walls along the path
constricted trail winding between rock walls ahead
vertical rock face forming the right boundary of the path

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a narrow rocky passage where large boulders flank the trail on both sides. The character ascends the rocky incline, moving through a confined stone corridor with sparse vegetation and a gravel surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark forest at dusk that gradually narrows into a confined rocky passage. It begins with a hooded character entering the frame and walking along a leaf-covered dirt path flanked by dense pine trees and a wooden fence. As the character progresses, the fence disappears and the forest opens slightly, allowing rocky outcrops to emerge on the right while the terrain becomes increasingly stony. The scene then shifts into a narrow corridor where large boulders flank the trail on both sides, replacing the wooded landscape with a confined stone environment. Finally, the character ascends a rocky incline through this gravel-surfaced passage characterized by sparse vegetation.
